case_title: RICHARD JONES VS. ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS SECURITY CONSULTANTS INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,783.24 PRINCIPAL, $211.69 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,199.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
